concerns.text: Duplicate task ID T081: appears twice with different purposes (real-world validation annotation in Phase 7, SC-003 verification in Phase X). Implementers cannot deterministically execute which T081 to complete.
Duplicate task ID T082: appears twice with different purposes (real-world validation evaluation in Phase 7, SC-005 verification in Phase X). This creates ambiguity for task completion tracking.
Duplicate task ID T101: appears twice (US1 FR-001 Verification in Phase 3, DOC004 documentation in Phase N). Task IDs must be unique for deterministic execution.
T089 references 'same as T081' but T081 is duplicated (Phase 7 vs Phase X). This creates ambiguity about which T081's output T089 depends on.
T053 mentions 'several thousand URLs' without a specific count. While executable, a concrete number (e.g., 5,000) would improve determinism for benchmarking.
T097 requires 'novice user verification' but does not specify how to document this verification (e.g., signed checklist, video log, or written confirmation). Add explicit documentation format.
